source_title: Cline doesn't recognize that Act mode is active
pattern: Long-running agents hit context limits; frameworks silently drop earlier messages. Agent continues as if full history is present.

messages_before_trim.content: You are a coding agent in Act mode.
Refactor the auth module in src/auth/login.ts
I'll update login.ts and add a regression test.
Also keep backward compatibility for legacy tokens.

messages_after_trim.content: You are a coding agent in Act mode.
Also keep backward compatibility for legacy tokens.
